## What changed
Describe your changes clearly.

## Why this change
Explain the motivation and expected outcome.

## Validation
- [ ] Ran local checks
- [ ] Updated docs/config as needed
- [ ] Added or updated tests (if applicable)

## Screenshots / Logs (if UI or behavior changed)
Provide before/after evidence where possible.

## Checklist
- [ ] Focused scope (no unrelated refactors)
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
- [ ] Ready for review
